reviews.comment:
Es una necesidad para en la ruta, pero me parece que es muy caro, deben pensar en familias que van con 2 o 3 hijos, de hace imposible comprar ahí. No hace falta sea tan caro.

(Translated by Google)
It's a necessity for the road, but I think it's very expensive. They should consider families traveling with two or three children, as it makes it impossible to buy food there. It doesn't have to be so expensive.
